Title: City Skyline Pocket Tee - Casual Men's and Women's T-Shirt
Description:
Celebrate the iconic urban landscape with this vibrant orange pocket tee. Featuring a subtle, stylish city skyline graphic on the chest pocket, this shirt is designed for comfort and casual flair.

Comfort Meets Style: Made from a soft, breathable fabric, this t-shirt feels great all day long, making it perfect for everyday wear whether you're running errands, grabbing coffee, or meeting friends.

Key Features:

  • Stylish Design: Minimalist city skyline graphic adds a sophisticated touch.
  • Versatile Fit: Comfortable, relaxed fit suitable for all body types and designed for both men and women.
  • Pocket Detail: Practical chest pocket for extra storage or simply for added style.
  • Durable & Washable: Maintains its vivid orange hue wash after wash.

This tee makes an excellent gift for architecture lovers, city dwellers, or anyone who appreciates modern, graphic casual wear. Pair it with your favorite jeans or shorts for a timeless, effortless look.
